Auto memory: objective progress - Recovered Aldrin Starweaver's journal which revealed that Velkor needs five stars of the Cardinal Pattern to complete the Harvest Ritual. Three stars have already vanished. Combined with the star charts, Sera can now predict which stars Velkor will target next.
Auto memory: NPC personal quest completed - Sera Brightwind: Recover Aldrin Starweaver's Lost Journal
Auto memory: NPC relationship reward applied - Sera Brightwind

Auto memory: objective progress - Sera analyzed the star charts and journal, revealing that Velkor needs five stars from the Cardinal Pattern. Three have vanished, leaving two targets: the Northern Sentinel and the Keystone Star. She presented two options: seek the Constellation Spirit at Skyreach Peaks for divine aid, or locate the Eternal Circle's sanctum beneath the old cathedral to confront Velkor before the fourth star falls.

Auto memory: objective progress - Asked Brother Aldric for strategic counsel. He confirmed the two paths Sera presented: seeking the Constellation Spirit at Skyreach Peaks for celestial power (safer but time-consuming), or attacking the sanctum directly (faster but extremely dangerous). He also revealed a third option: he could guide the party through the sanctum's outer defenses if they move swiftly and trust him.
Auto memory: NPC relationship penalty applied - Sera Brightwind
Auto memory: major choice recorded - Refused to return Aldrin Starweaver's journal to Sera Brightwind despite her plea.
Auto memory: NPC relationship reward applied - Sera Brightwind
Auto memory: major choice recorded - Apologized to Sera and returned Aldrin Starweaver's journal after initially refusing.

Auto memory: objective progress - Destroyed the Eternal Circle's ritual site and recovered three stellar essence shards containing the power of the stolen stars. Cultists are fleeing deeper into the cathedral catacombs.
Auto memory: major choice recorded - Destroyed an Eternal Circle ritual site in the ruined cathedral archives.

Auto memory: objective progress - Destroyed the Eternal Circle's ritual site and recovered three stellar essence shards. Cultists warned that Velkor will complete the fourth star binding tonight and fled to the main sanctum in the cathedral's deepest catacombs.
Auto memory: faction updated - The Eternal Circle
Auto memory: major choice recorded - Destroyed an Eternal Circle ritual site in the ruined cathedral archives.

Auto memory: objective progress - Gathered intelligence on Eternal Circle activity in Millhaven. Learned of nocturnal meetings at the Eastgate shrine and suspicious activity at the Harrow Estate. Captain Stoneshield shared evidence of a circular symbol with star-like points.
Auto memory: new location recorded - Millhaven Market Square

Auto memory: objective progress - Publicly exposed the Eternal Circle in Millhaven's market square. The cult now knows the party destroyed their ritual site and will accelerate Velkor's timeline to act tonight. Cult members fled into the city while townspeople reacted with mixed fear, gratitude, and hostility.
Auto memory: faction reputation changed - The Eternal Circle (enemy)
Auto memory: major choice recorded - Openly declared destroying an Eternal Circle ritual site and publicly exposed the cult to the people of Millhaven.
Auto memory: objective set - Restore the celestial beacons across the realm

Auto memory: objective progress - Made contact with the Constellation Spirit who tasked the party with restoring the celestial beacons. Sera identified five primary beacons aligned with the Cardinal Stars, with key locations at Frostwatch Mountains and the Eastern Marshes' Sunken Spire. Brother Aldric revealed the Eternal Circle has been corrupting these beacons to weaken celestial anchors. Time pressure remains critical as Velkor plans to complete the fourth binding tonight.
Auto memory: major choice recorded - The Constellation Spirit asks us to restore the celestial beacons across the realm.

Auto memory: objective progress - The Eternal Circle launched Operation Fifth Starfall to recover the stellar essence shards. Brother Aldric revealed the shards are critical keys to Velkor's ritual—without them, the fourth binding cannot be completed. Eternal Circle forces are advancing from three directions with military precision.
Auto memory: faction quest added - The Eternal Circle: Operation Fifth Starfall

Auto memory: objective progress - Prevented the Eternal Circle from recovering the stellar essence shards during Operation Fifth Starfall. Captain Stoneshield rallied the town guard for defense while Brother Aldric confirmed holding the shards prevents Velkor from completing the fourth binding. Sera offered to shield the shards at the observatory. The Eternal Circle assault has begun from three directions.
Auto memory: faction quest failed - The Eternal Circle: Operation Fifth Starfall
Auto memory: major choice recorded - Chose to defend the stellar essence shards and stop Operation Fifth Starfall.

Auto memory: objective progress - Successfully defended Millhaven against the Eternal Circle assault and prevented them from recovering the stellar essence shards during Operation Fifth Starfall. Without the shards, Velkor cannot complete the fourth binding ritual.
Auto memory: faction quest completed - The Eternal Circle: Operation Fifth Starfall
Auto memory: major choice recorded - Stopped Operation Fifth Starfall and prevented the Eternal Circle from recovering the stellar essence shards.

Auto memory: objective progress - Successfully defended Millhaven and prevented the Eternal Circle from recovering the stellar essence shards during Operation Fifth Starfall. Without the shards, Velkor cannot complete the fourth binding ritual despite perfect celestial alignment. The Eternal Circle forces have been driven into retreat.
Auto memory: faction quest failed - The Eternal Circle: Operation Fifth Starfall

Auto memory: objective progress - The Eternal Circle launched coordinated retaliation attacks across Millhaven following their failed assault. Fires were set in the old warehouses near the docks, the merchant guild hall, and the temple district where families took shelter. The attacks may be punishment for the town's support of the party or a distraction covering another strategic objective.
Auto memory: faction quest added - The Eternal Circle: Retaliation Against Millhaven
Auto memory: world event added - The Eternal Circle's Retaliation

Auto memory: objective progress - The stolen stars are attempting to return through severed celestial pathways, causing massive instability near Skyreach Peaks. The Constellation Spirit may be attempting to stabilize the damage or may be in danger. Velkor may attempt to claim the Spirit's essence directly to achieve immortality.
Auto memory: world event added - Celestial Instability at Skyreach Peaks
Auto memory: world event resolved - The Eternal Circle's Retaliation

Auto memory: objective progress - Successfully defended Millhaven against the Eternal Circle's retaliation force. The fires have been contained and the immediate threat to the town has been neutralized. Three cultists were captured for questioning. Focus now shifts to Skyreach Peaks where Velkor may attempt to claim the Constellation Spirit's essence directly.

Auto memory: major choice recorded - Decided to destroy the Observatory Tower to stop Velkor's ritual.

Auto memory: objective progress - Destroyed the Observatory Tower in a controlled demolition to prevent Velkor from using it as a ritual focus. Sera salvaged Aldrin's irreplaceable research. The tower's destruction denies Velkor critical infrastructure but forces the final confrontation at Skyreach Peaks.
Auto memory: location updated - Observatory Tower
Auto memory: major choice recorded - Destroyed the Observatory Tower to deny Velkor the focusing point needed for his ritual.

Velkor has lost his greatest tool and now has only one path left—claiming the Constellation Spirit's power directly at Skyreach Peaks. Scouts report increased Eternal Circle activity on the northern road toward Skyreach Peaks.

sideQuests.title: Recover the Missing Star Charts
sideQuests.description: Venture into the ruined cathedral archives beneath Millhaven to recover ancient star charts that predate the Observatory's records. These charts may reveal the pattern behind Velkor Wrenn's star selections and help locate the Eternal Circle's sanctum.
